title: France
content: France is a country in Western Europe. Its capital and largest city is Paris.

title: Pride and Prejudice
content: Pride and Prejudice is a novel written by Jane Austen and first published in 1813.

title: The Eiffel Tower
content: The Eiffel Tower is a wrought-iron landmark located in Paris, France.

title: Jane Austen
content: Jane Austen was an English novelist known for Pride and Prejudice.
